description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a detachable box magazine. The rifle has a full-length Picatinny rail along the top for mounting optics or accessories, and a standard barrel with a flash hider at the muzzle. The pistol grip and adjustable stock are ergonomically designed for comfort and control. The handguard is ribbed for improved grip and heat dissipation, and the magazine well is flared for easier reloads. Iron sights are mounted on the rail, and the overall construction appears robust, likely using a combination of metal and polymer materials. The rifle's design is typical of those used by law enforcement or military personnel in urban environments.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable magazine, and full-length Picatinny rail. Features include iron sights, a ribbed handguard, and a flash hider.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the flash hider.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and full-length Picatinny rail.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from above, highlighting the Picatinny rail and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the ejection port, magazine release, and additional details of the stock and handguard.
